title: cotoneaster vulgaris var. tomentosus
intro: Cotoneaster vulgaris var. tomentosus, also known as the downy cotoneaster, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and promoting wound healing due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cotoneaster vulgaris var. tomentosus include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive problems, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in folk medicine as a poultice to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
